description_long: This object is a stylized mushroom with a large, rounded cap that is bright red and adorned with several white spots of varying sizes. The cap has a smooth, glossy surface with visible highlights, suggesting a slightly reflective texture. The stem is thick, short, and tapers slightly towards the base, colored in shades of gray and off-white with subtle shading to indicate volume. The underside of the cap is not visible, so gill details are absent. The overall form is simple and cartoon-like, with clean lines and no intricate surface details. This mushroom would be visually striking in an urban park or decorative garden setting.
description: A bright red, spotted mushroom with a smooth, glossy cap and a thick, grayish stem. The design is simple and stylized, with no visible gills.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded red cap with white spots and the thick, grayish stem.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more white spots on the cap and a clearer view of the stem's shading.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cap's red surface and white spots, stem mostly visible and no gills shown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the largest white spot on the cap and the stem's base more prominent.
